productDisplayName: Mumbai Slang Women Light Green Kurti
description: Style Note Looking to combine the ethnic look with contemporary styling in your outfit? These kurtis from mumbai slang are just what you need to give your casual wear the comfort quotient. Wear this kurti with co-ordinated leggings and carry a stylish tote to finish off your outfit. Product Details Light green printed short kurti with colourful patterns, has short sleeves with decorative stitching, V neckline, a half buttoned placket, collars with rounded tips, curved hemline with elastication at the sides of the hip for better Fit Material and Care Blended cotton Wash using mild detergent Do not dry in direct sunlight Do not bleach Do not iron directly on print or embroidery Use warm iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
